languages.text: "Хороший урок для всех, кто искушает судьбу и испытывает терпение Бога-Императора. Но он еще не закончен. У меня есть задание для тебя".
"A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."
languages.original_text: "Хороший урок для всех, кто искушает судьбу и испытывает терпение Бога-Императора. Но он еще не закончен. У меня есть задание для тебя".

traits.locale_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."
"A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."
"A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

languages.text: “这是给所有妄图试探命运、考验神皇耐心之人上的绝佳一课。不过你的课还没上完，我还有任务要给你。”
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: “这是给所有妄图试探命运、考验神皇耐心之人上的绝佳一课。不过你的课还没上完，我还有任务要给你。”

languages.text: « Voilà qui vous apprendra à tenter le diable et à abuser de la patience de l'Empereur-Dieu. Mais votre leçon n'est pas terminée. J'ai une tâche à vous confier. »
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà qui vous apprendra à tenter le diable et à abuser de la patience de l'Empereur-Dieu. Mais votre leçon n'est pas terminée. J'ai une tâche à vous confier. »

languages.text: "Kaderi kışkırtan ve Tanrı İmparator'un sabrını sınayan herkese güzel bir ders. Ancak dersin henüz bitmedi. Sana bir görevim var."
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: "Kaderi kışkırtan ve Tanrı İmparator'un sabrını sınayan herkese güzel bir ders. Ancak dersin henüz bitmedi. Sana bir görevim var."

languages.text: «Una gran lección para quienes pretenden tentar al destino y poner a prueba la paciencia del Dios Emperador, pero aún no ha acabado. Tengo una tarea para ti».
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: «Una gran lección para quienes pretenden tentar al destino y poner a prueba la paciencia del Dios Emperador, pero aún no ha acabado. Tengo una tarea para ti».

languages.text: "Eine feine Lektion für alle, die das Schicksal und die Geduld des Gottimperators herausfordern. Aber Eure Lektion ist noch nicht zu Ende. Ich habe eine Aufgabe für Euch."
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: "Eine feine Lektion für alle, die das Schicksal und die Geduld des Gottimperators herausfordern. Aber Eure Lektion ist noch nicht zu Ende. Ich habe eine Aufgabe für Euch."

languages.text: 「運命に挑戦し、神皇帝の忍耐を試す者たちへの教訓となるだろう。だが、君の教訓はまだ終わっていない。君に任命する任務がある。」
languages.original_text: "A fine lesson for all those who tempt fate and try the patience of the God-Emperor. But your lesson is not yet finished. I have a task for you."

traits.locale_text: 「運命に挑戦し、神皇帝の忍耐を試す者たちへの教訓となるだろう。だが、君の教訓はまだ終わっていない。君に任命する任務がある。」
